title: 日本ダービーの後に・逃したのは誰

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You came all this way to meet me? Don't you
have anything better to do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to worry. I may have lost the
Derby title, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not done with the Classics yet. There's still the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz.
choice_data_list: Are you going to get that?
Are you going to get that?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...It's fine. I'm ignoring it on pur—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I dropped it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep.

text_block_list.name: Phone
text_block_list.text: Hello? King, are you there?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why? Why does she have to call me now?!

text_block_list.name: Phone
text_block_list.text: If you're there, then answer me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hello, Mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So I finally get a reply. I swear, the little games
you like to play—you're like a child.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, you just like to treat me like one...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I can't always answer you immediately. I have
business to attend to, you know.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. I imagine you're referring to the Derby.
Which reminds me, it was quite something.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's been a good while since I've seen someone
capture the hearts of the crowd with their running
like Special Week.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
How unfortunate it is to run against someone like
her. I bet you're ready to throw in the towel about
now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're better off coming home now, before you
have another chance to disgrace yourself even
further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep. Click.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What a way to speak to someone.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All she does is call me out of the blue, saying I'll
disgrace myself and telling me to give up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do I give up easily? Will I disgrace myself?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Quite the opposite! I am a first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Listen, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win the Kikuka Sho! First place will be mine!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose to anyone, be it Seiun Sky or Special
Week!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Because I'm King Halo! A first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And I deserve to be recognized!
